# Meeting Minutes

_26 Sep 25_

_Subject_: Week 8 Client/Inter-Workstream Meeting (WS1–3)  
_Project Name_: P11 - BIOTech Futures Student Mentoring Platform  
_Facilitator_: Client (William Nixon)  
_Prepared by_: David Tan  
_Mode_: Hybrid  
_Date_: 26 Sep 25  
_Time_: 10:00 – 11:00  
_Attendees_: Edbert Suwandi, David Tan, Hugo Sun, Xinsheng Liu  
_Absent_: N/A

| #   | Agenda Item         | Description/Comments                                                                                                                                                               | Decision/Action                                                                  | Who?     | Items for Escalation                                     |
| --- | ------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | Database (DB)       | Waiting on Client (Will) to activate and pay for the Azure DB instance. Development still using local DB.                                                                          | Client to provision Azure DB instance. Continue local development in interim.    | Client   | Escalate if DB not provisioned before next integration.  |
| 2   | Integration Updates | WS2 may lead integration depending on complexity. WS3 merged into Main (with WS2 Stable Release). WS3 may continue merging to Main; revert if errors occur.                        | WS2 to monitor stability of integration. Ensure rollback plan in case of errors. | WS2, WS3 | N/A                                                      |
| 3   | WS3 Updates         | WS3 using Django backend with SQLite (may require role storage changes). They maintain a separate config under `backend/core`, creating potential merge conflicts with WS2 config. | Resolve merge conflicts between `backend/config` (WS2) and `backend/core` (WS3). | WS2, WS3 | Potential escalation if config merge blocks development. |
| 4   | WS1 Updates         | WS1 will begin integration with WS2 API once Swagger API docs are supplied.                                                                                                        | WS2 to send Swagger API docs to WS1.                                             | WS2      | N/A                                                      |
| 5   | Action Items (WS2)  | 1) Properly merge WS3 code into WS2 under Main. 2) Resolve config directory conflicts. 3) Ensure WS3 DB models + migrations visible in Django Admin. 4) Send Swagger docs.         | WS2 to complete merges and API documentation delivery.                           | WS2      | N/A                                                      |

---

### Appendix / Image links

> Notes: Under the current main branch, only WS3 DB models/migrations are visible in Django Admin.
